Here we want to remove our buying friction by showing the customer exactly what they're going to get and expect to get after clicking that button. Like I said, this helps reduce shopping cart rate, it's up to 85% loss of sales and you can prevent a lot of that if you follow these steps. Here's what will happen the moment you click the add to cart button below this video. Notice I don't say there's no if and if you click it's win. Here's what will happen the moment you click the add to cart button. First you'll be taken to our 100% secure checkout page. Again, I'm reducing friction by assuring them that the purchase is on a secure page. It's going to look like this. So when you see this you know you're in the right place. It's 100% secure checkout page. It's protected by a verisign and then after you order you can select the add-ons that you purchase that you prefer to help you get started losing weight even faster. Now by the way folks this is a very good way to phrase what would normally be a very destructive thing to put in. In other words, you want upsells. The backside of a product is probably 100% of the revenue. So you can double your revenue or close to it with a healthy, healthy back end. So this is kind of what they're already trained to see add-ons. You know what I'm saying? I say you will get something to give them benefit. In this case the add-ons will help them lose weight even faster. And then simply click on the button that says complete your order. It's going to look just like this. And this by the way on ClickBank at least if you're a ClickBank user you probably know that is the button that very few people click sometimes. And so a lot of customer service issues is because they didn't click that complete your order button.
